description: Ketubba. Location: Fustat. Dated: Thursday, 5 Ḥeshvan 1553 Seleucid = 11 October 1241 CE, without any reshut clause. Bride: a widow called 'al-Sitt al-Fāḍila' bt. Shela. Groom: Yeḥezqel b. Eliyya. Goitein notes "In Aramaic; despite the bad preservation worth studying for the Aramaic formulary.) (Information from CUDL and Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
